message:
Merge pull request #401 from kubestellar/copilot/fix-preview-links-issue

Fix preview URLs redirecting to production in Netlify deployments

files.patch: @@ -4,6 +4,7 @@ import { Banner } from 'nextra/components' import Link from 'next/link' import { useTheme } from 'next-themes' import { useState, useEffect } from 'react' +import { getLocalizedUrl } from '@/lib/url' export function DocsBanner() { const { resolvedTheme } = useTheme() @@ -24,15 +25,15 @@ export function DocsBanner() { 🚀 🚀 🚀 ATTENTION: KubeStellar needs your help - please take our 2-minute survey{' '} - https://kubestellar.io/survey + {getLocalizedUrl("https://kubestellar.io/survey")} {' '}🚀 🚀 🚀
